    A

    alternating(String, ChatColor...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.ChatColors
    This method colors the given String in alternating Colors.

    Pattern for '[A-Za-z "_]+'

    C

    ChatColors - Class in dev.yanianz.star.common
    This class contains some utilities related to ChatColor.
    COLON - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for ':'
    color(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.ChatColors
    This is just a simple shortcut for: ChatColor.translateAlternateColorCodes('&', input)
    COMMA - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for ','
    CommonPatterns - Class in dev.yanianz.star.common
    This class is created for common-use patterns used in things such as String.split(String).

    D

    DASH - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for '-'
    dev.yanianz.star.common - package dev.yanianz.star.common
    This package holds some utility classes which are used in multiple other modules.
    dev.yanianz.star.versions - package dev.yanianz.star.versions
    This package provides some utilities which are useful for "version management".

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.PrefixedVersion
    equals(Object) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    equals(Object) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SimpleNumericVersion
    equalsIgnorePatch(int, int) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This method returns whether this SemanticVersion equals the provided version numbers (ignoring the patch version of this SemanticVersion).
    equalsIgnorePatch(SemanticVersion) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This method returns whether this SemanticVersion equals the provided version in all aspects except their patch number.
    exclusiveBetween(double, double, double, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified primitive value falls between the two exclusive values specified; otherwise, throws an exception with the specified message.
    exclusiveBetween(long, long, long, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified primitive value falls between the two exclusive values specified; otherwise, throws an exception with the specified message.
    exclusiveBetween(T, T, Comparable, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument object fall between the two exclusive values specified; otherwise, throws an exception with the specified message.

    F

    findByName(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.PlayerList
    This method returns an Optional that describes whether a Player with the given Name is currently online or not.
    findPermitted(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.PlayerList
    This method returns a Set of online Players that have the specified Permission.
    finite(double, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the specified argument is not infinite or NaN; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.

    G

    get() - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.MinecraftVersion
    This attempts to get the MinecraftVersion on which the current Server is running on.
    getAsString() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.MinecraftVersion
    This method returns this Version as a human-readable format.
    getAsString() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.PrefixedVersion
    This method returns this Version as a human-readable format.
    getAsString() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This method returns this Version as a human-readable format.
    getAsString() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SimpleNumericVersion
    This method returns this Version as a human-readable format.
    getAsString() - Method in interface dev.yanianz.star.versions.Version
    This method returns this Version as a human-readable format.
    getMajorVersion() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This returns the "major" version component of this SemanticVersion.
    getMinorVersion() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This returns the "minor" version component of this SemanticVersion.
    getPatchVersion() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This returns the "patch" version component of this SemanticVersion.
    getPrefix() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.PrefixedVersion
    This returns the prefix for this PrefixedVersion.
    getVersion() - Method in interface dev.yanianz.star.versions.Versioned
    This returns the current Version of this object.
    getVersionNumber() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.PrefixedVersion
    This method returns the version number which this numeric Version represents.
    getVersionNumber() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SimpleNumericVersion
    This method returns the version number which this numeric Version represents.

    IncomparableVersionsException - Exception Class in dev.yanianz.star.versions
    An IncomparableVersionsException is thrown when two objects of the type Version could not be compared.
    isAssignableFrom(Class, Class, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the argument can be converted to the specified class, if not throws an exception.

    isAtLeast(Version) - Method in interface dev.yanianz.star.versions.Version
    This method returns whether this Version is equal to or newer than the provided Version.
    isEqualTo(Version) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.PrefixedVersion
    This method returns whether this Version is equal to the given Version.

    This method returns whether this Version is equal to the given Version.
    isEqualTo(Version) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SemanticVersion
    This method returns whether this Version is equal to the given Version.
    isEqualTo(Version) - Method in interface dev.yanianz.star.versions.Version
    This method returns whether this Version is equal to the given Version.
    isInstanceOf(Class, Object, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the argument is an instance of the specified class; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.

    This checks if the current Server instance is a mock (MockBukkit) and whether we are in a Unit Test environment.
    isMocked(Server) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.versions.MinecraftVersion
    This checks if the current Server instance is a mock (MockBukkit) and whether we are in a Unit Test environment.

    This method returns whether this Version is newer than the provided Version.

    This method returns whether this Version is older than the provided Version.

    This method checks if a Player with the given name is currently online on the server.

    This method returns whether this is a patch version.

    This returns whether this Version is "similar" to the given Version.

    matchesPattern(CharSequence, String, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument character sequence matches the specified regular expression pattern; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    MINECRAFT_NAMESPACEDKEY - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for 'minecraft:[a-z_]+'
    MinecraftVersion - Class in dev.yanianz.star.versions
    This is an extension of SemanticVersion, specifically designed for Minecraft's versioning system.
    MinecraftVersion(int, int, int) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.versions.MinecraftVersion
    This method constructs a new MinecraftVersion with the given version components.

    N

    noNullElements(T[], String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument array is neither null nor contains any elements that are null; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    noNullElements(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument iterable is neither null nor contains any elements that are null; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notBlank(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument character sequence is neither null, a length of zero (no characters), empty nor whitespace; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notEmpty(T[], String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument array is neither null nor a length of zero (no elements); otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notEmpty(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument character sequence is neither null nor a length of zero (no characters); otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notEmpty(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument collection is neither null nor a size of zero (no elements); otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notEmpty(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument map is neither null nor a size of zero (no elements); otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notNaN(double, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the specified argument is not NaN; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    notNull(T, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the specified argument is not null; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.

    SEMICOLON - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for ';'
    SimpleNumericVersion - Class in dev.yanianz.star.versions
    This Version implementation consists of only one component, the version number.
    SimpleNumericVersion(int) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.versions.SimpleNumericVersion
    This constructs a new SimpleNumericVersion with the given version number.
    SLASH - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.common.CommonPatterns
    Pattern for '/'

    V

    Validate - Class in dev.yanianz.star.common
    This class is modified from Apache's commons-lang3 package.
    validIndex(T[], int, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the index is within the bounds of the argument array; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    validIndex(T, int, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the index is within the bounds of the argument character sequence; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    validIndex(T, int, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validates that the index is within the bounds of the argument collection; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    validState(boolean, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.common.Validate
    Validate that the stateful condition is true; otherwise throwing an exception with the specified message.
    Version - Interface in dev.yanianz.star.versions
    A Version is a unique name or number that describes the condition of an object.
    Versioned - Interface in dev.yanianz.star.versions
    This interface marks something as "versioned" which means that it has a Version that may change over time.
